mapper.select: select distinct uop.org_post_id from sys_user_org_post uop inner join sys_user u on u.id = uop.user_id where u.username = 'admin' and u.status = '0' and uop.status = '0' order by uop.org_post_id asc

select m.id from sys_user_org_post uop inner join sys_org_post op on op.id = uop.org_post_id and op.status = '0' and op.org_unit_id = #{companyId} inner join sys_org_post_module_auth ma on ma.org_post_id = uop.org_post_id and ma.module_visible = '1' inner join sys_module m on m.id = ma.module_id and m.status = '0' where uop.user_id = #{userId} and uop.status = '0' group by m.id, m.sort order by m.sort asc, m.id asc

select ma.module_id as moduleId, case when max(case when ma.nav_visible = '1' then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then '1' else '0' end as navVisible from sys_user_org_post uop inner join sys_org_post op on op.id = uop.org_post_id and op.status = '0' and op.org_unit_id = #{companyId} inner join sys_org_post_module_auth ma on ma.org_post_id = uop.org_post_id and ma.module_visible = '1' inner join sys_module m on m.id = ma.module_id and m.status = '0' where uop.user_id = #{userId} and uop.status = '0' group by ma.module_id order by ma.module_id asc

select count(distinct m.id) from sys_user_org_post uop inner join sys_org_post op on op.id = uop.org_post_id and op.status = '0' and op.org_unit_id = #{companyId} inner join sys_org_post_module_auth ma on ma.org_post_id = uop.org_post_id and ma.module_visible = '1' inner join sys_module m on m.id = ma.module_id and m.module_code = #{moduleCode} and m.status = '0' where uop.user_id = #{userId} and uop.status = '0'

select max(ba.permission_level) from sys_user_org_post uop inner join sys_org_post op on op.id = uop.org_post_id and op.status = '0' and op.org_unit_id = #{companyId} inner join sys_org_post_module_auth ma on ma.org_post_id = uop.org_post_id and ma.module_visible = '1' inner join sys_org_post_button_auth ba on ba.org_post_id = uop.org_post_id and ba.module_id = ma.module_id inner join sys_module m on m.id = ba.module_id and m.module_code = #{moduleCode} and m.status = '0' inner join sys_module_button b on b.id = ba.button_id and b.module_id = m.id and b.button_code = #{buttonCode} and b.status = '0' where uop.user_id = #{userId} and uop.status = '0'

select fa.field_id as fieldId, max(fa.permission_level) as permissionLevel from sys_user_org_post uop inner join sys_org_post op on op.id = uop.org_post_id and op.status = '0' and op.org_unit_id = #{companyId} inner join sys_org_post_module_auth ma on ma.org_post_id = uop.org_post_id and ma.module_id = #{moduleId} and ma.module_visible = '1' inner join sys_org_post_field_auth fa on fa.org_post_id = uop.org_post_id and fa.module_id = #{moduleId} inner join sys_module_field_title f on f.field_id = fa.field_id and f.locale = 'zh_CN' and f.status = '0' where uop.user_id = #{userId} and uop.status = '0' group by fa.field_id order by fa.field_id asc

select ba.button_id as buttonId, max(ba.permission_level) as permissionLevel from sys_user_org_post uop inner join sys_org_post op on op.id = uop.org_post_id and op.status = '0' and op.org_unit_id = #{companyId} inner join sys_org_post_module_auth ma on ma.org_post_id = uop.org_post_id and ma.module_id = #{moduleId} and ma.module_visible = '1' inner join sys_org_post_button_auth ba on ba.org_post_id = uop.org_post_id and ba.module_id = #{moduleId} inner join sys_module_button b on b.id = ba.button_id and b.status = '0' where uop.user_id = #{userId} and uop.status = '0' group by ba.button_id order by ba.button_id asc
select count(1) from sys_org_post_module_auth where org_post_id = #{orgPostId} and module_visible = '1'
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_org_post_field_auth ( id, org_post_id, module_id, field_id, permission_level, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note ) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.orgPostId}, #{item.moduleId}, #{item.fieldId}, #{item.permissionLevel, typeHandler=com.soli.common.core.mybatis.handler.DbEnumTypeHandler}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.note})

insert into sys_org_post_button_auth ( id, org_post_id, module_id, button_id, permission_level, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note ) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.orgPostId}, #{item.moduleId}, #{item.buttonId}, #{item.permissionLevel, typeHandler=com.soli.common.core.mybatis.handler.DbEnumTypeHandler}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.note})
mapper.select: select id, module_id, state_code, field_id, permission_level, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note from sys_module_state_field_auth where module_id = #{moduleId} order by id asc
select id, module_id, state_code, button_id, permission_level, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note from sys_module_state_button_auth where module_id = #{moduleId} order by id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_module_state_field_auth ( id, module_id, state_code, field_id, permission_level, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note ) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.moduleId}, #{item.stateCode}, #{item.fieldId}, #{item.permissionLevel, typeHandler=com.soli.common.core.mybatis.handler.DbEnumTypeHandler}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.note})

insert into sys_module_state_button_auth ( id, module_id, state_code, button_id, permission_level, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, note ) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.moduleId}, #{item.stateCode}, #{item.buttonId}, #{item.permissionLevel, typeHandler=com.soli.common.core.mybatis.handler.DbEnumTypeHandler}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.note})
